name: numeric-fingerprint-update-geometry-v1
frozen_at: 2026-07-14 after dynamics-v1 and optimizer-transplant-v1 completed, before any update-geometry measurement
question: Along the completed preference and control student trajectories, does the exact next AdamW update show a replicated weight-seed3 shift from wolf-writing during emergence toward less wolf-writing during attenuation, relative to standard?

scope.main_quantity: S_live(r,s,c,t) = grad_theta mean held-out wolf margin at the saved live state dot the exact historical next AdamW parameter update for that trajectory condition.
scope.finite_quantity: F(r,s,t) is the corresponding paired difference in directly evaluated one-step wolf-margin changes.
scope.counterfactual_forks: Every saved preference/control state is also forked on the opposite paired numeric condition. These same-state preference-vs-control contrasts are diagnostic; they do not replace the live-trajectory quantity.
scope.credit_assignment_claim: Positive A or F means the condition-specific optimizer trajectory is instantaneously writing wolf margin faster than its paired control trajectory at that checkpoint. A single next batch is noisy and no checkpoint-wise sign rule is used.
scope.limits: This identifies local LoRA/AdamW writability and direct one-step behavior, not a unique full-training mechanism or a claim that wolf is the only loss-reducing solution.

excluded_checkpoint.reason: The frozen schedule exposes zero learning rate for the next update.

frozen_analysis.notation: At each checkpoint let A_xy be the wolf-gradient projection of the exact AdamW update from live state x in {P,C} when forked on data y in {P,C}; define the same quantities for direct finite-step wolf-margin changes.
frozen_analysis.primary_series: S_r,s(t)=A_PP(t)-A_CC(t), the paired matching-condition/live update. Report S for actual AdamW projection and direct finite-step change at every frozen checkpoint.
frozen_analysis.factorial_decomposition: D(t)=((A_PP-A_PC)+(A_CP-A_CC))/2 is the half-scaled same-state preference-data main effect. I(t)=(A_PP-A_PC)-(A_CP-A_CC) is the unhalved state-by-data interaction and therefore is not on the same factorial scaling as D. Report D and I for actual, raw-gradient, Adam history-numerator adaptive, Adam current-gradient adaptive, and direct finite-step quantities; the counterfactual forks remain diagnostic.
frozen_analysis.primary_phases: Early is updates 64/128; late is 1024/1536/2048. Updates 0/16 are onset diagnostics and 256/512 are transition diagnostics, excluded from the frozen phase means.
frozen_analysis.cross_receiver_contrast: For each seed Q=[mean_late S_standard-mean_early S_standard]-[mean_late S_weight_seed3-mean_early S_weight_seed3].
frozen_analysis.strong_route_replacement_support: Require Q>0, mean_early D_weight_seed3>0, mean_early S_weight_seed3>0, and mean_early S_weight_seed3-mean_late S_weight_seed3>0 in both seeds for the actual AdamW projection, with all four signs independently present for direct finite-step changes.
frozen_analysis.strong_route_shutdown_support: A strictly stronger label additionally requires mean_late S_weight_seed3<=0 in both seeds for both the actual AdamW projection and direct finite-step changes. Route replacement does not otherwise imply complete shutdown.
frozen_analysis.evidence_against: Evidence against if any one necessary actual-projection quantity is nonpositive in both seeds: Q, mean_early D_weight_seed3, mean_early S_weight_seed3, or mean_early S_weight_seed3-mean_late S_weight_seed3. Any other failure of the strong rules is mixed.
frozen_analysis.linearization_role: Direct finite-step changes validate the local projection and are required for the strongest label, but they do not replace the actual-update projection as the mechanism primary.
frozen_analysis.association: Spearman association with the frozen forward behavioral-transfer slope is secondary; it is reported per receiver/seed and is not a decision gate.
frozen_analysis.raw_gradient_role: Repeat D, I, phase means, and Q for the clipped raw-gradient LR-scaled projection to distinguish a tangent-level effect from adaptive optimizer selection; decompose the adaptive update exactly into beta1*m_old history and (1-beta1)*g_current numerators under their shared updated-v denominator. Raw and component results do not determine the primary label.

artifacts.completion_policy: cell.json is the only cell completion sentinel; interrupted numbered attempts are preserved and replayed from the immutable source snapshot.
